name: Content Generator
description: Generates a 400-word blog-post section on a given technical topic. Output is used as input to the eval judge lane.

checks.prompt: Write a 400-word blog post section titled 'Why Eval Pipelines Are the Missing Piece in AI Agents'. The section should cover: (1) why output quality degrades silently over time, (2) how LLM-as-judge scoring works, (3) the value of golden output regression tests, (4) how a CI eval gate blocks regressions before they ship. Write clearly and concisely for a technical engineering audience.
